message:
feat(cgse): add complexity oracle for witness verification

- Add analytic_upper_bound() supporting 10 complexity classes:
  n, m, n_plus_m, n_log_n, n_plus_m_log_n, n_m, n_squared, n_m_alpha,
  m_log_m, m_log_n
- Add verify_complexity_bound() to check if observed count is within 2x
- Add assert_complexity_within_bounds() for assertion-style checks
- Add ComplexityBoundResult struct for detailed verification results
- Add 6 new tests covering bounds calculation

br-franken_networkx-867m: C8 Complexity oracle

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
